name: Kilkarney Hills Golf Course & Banquet Facility
about: Kilkarney Hills Golf Course & Banquet Facility is a premier destination offering an 18-hole championship golf course and full-service banquet facilities. Located in River Falls, WI, the venue caters to both golfers and event planners with a combination of outdoor play, year-round indoor simulators, and versatile event spaces. The facility maintains high standards, holding membership in the National Golf Course Owner Association and receiving The Knot's Best Of Weddings award. It serves the Twin Cities Metro Area and Western Wisconsin, providing a blend of recreation and relaxation with options for casual play, competitive leagues, tournaments, and large-scale events.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round high-tech indoor golf simulators for practice in any weather
Championship 18-hole outdoor course with scenic Wisconsin backdrop
Membership program offering discounts and access to specially priced tournaments
Versatile spaces for both competitive leagues and casual play

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service catering available for events, with banquet menus and food/drink specials for leagues
Food and beverage specials available in clubhouse for league events

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility provides club rentals and has a pro shop for golfers who may need equipment or want to purchase merchandise.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: While outside food may be restricted, the facility offers full-service catering and a clubhouse with food and beverage specials for events and league play.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole play times vary, but the facility hosts leagues that typically play 9 holes with food/drink specials, suggesting flexible options for different time commitments.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Kilkarney Hills caters to families with junior/youth programs and offers a welcoming environment suitable for golfers of all skill levels, including beginners.
